role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (oil palms, coconuts) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, drainage infrastructure, and utility pole styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (concrete walls, pole hardware) and camera metadata.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Indonesia. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing concrete visual evidence (palm species, drainage ditches, utility poles) to support their hypotheses. The linguistic agent correctly noted the lack of text. The synthesis effectively used the specialists' consensus on Southeast Asian infrastructure to narrow the candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of palms, ditches, and road width match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified oil and coconut palms visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Concrete drainage and utility poles are clearly visible and described accurately.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Infrastructure details cited are present in the image.
